summary: Complete testing of Mill Entry System - All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. 17/17 API tests passed. Login, Dashboard & Targets, Payments tabs verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified. Desktop Electron app components were not tested as they require Electron runtime.

login_with_admin.description: Login with admin/admin123 works correctly and shows main interface

entries_tab.description: Shows data table with correct columns: Date, Season, Truck, RST No., TP No., Agent, Mandi, QNTL, BAG, Mill W, Cut%, Final W, G.Issued, Cash, Diesel, Actions

dashboard_targets_tab.description: Shows Mandi Target vs Achieved with progress bars, agent payments calculation

payments_tab.description: Shows Truck Payments, Truck Owner, Agent Payments sub-tabs

api_tests_results.auth_verify: PASSED - Returns valid=true for valid user
api_tests_results.suggestions_agents: PASSED - Returns {suggestions: [Debu, Ramesh, Suresh Kumar, Test Agent]}
api_tests_results.suggestions_mandis: PASSED - Returns {suggestions: [Bhawanipatna, Kesinga, Test Mandi, maa Jogmaya]}
api_tests_results.totals: PASSED - Returns totals object with total_kg, total_qntl, total_bag etc.
api_tests_results.mandi_targets_summary: PASSED - Returns array with target details

notes: Entries table shows 0 entries when KMS Year filter is set to 2025-2026 because existing entries have empty kms_year field. This is expected behavior.
Desktop Electron app (desktop-app/main.js) was not tested as it requires Electron runtime environment.
All web version APIs work correctly with the preview URL.
